title: ActiveCampaign vs Brevo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and Brevo. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business needs.
intro: Both ActiveCampaign and Brevo are powerful email marketing platforms with CRM capabilities, but they cater to different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels in advanced automation and lead scoring, while Brevo offers a generous free tier and multi-channel communication tools. This guide helps you choose the right platform based on your budget, team size, and marketing complexity.

comparison_table.tool_b: Freemium, free plan up to 100k contacts, paid from $25/month
Yes, unlimited contacts with limited features

comparison_table.tool_a: Advanced automation workflows with lead scoring

comparison_table.tool_b: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat
Yes, CRM included in all plans

choose_a_if: You need advanced automation and lead scoring for complex sales funnels
You want the deepest CRM integration with email marketing
You're an established business prioritizing ROI over cost savings
choose_b_if: You're starting out and want to test email marketing for free
You need omnichannel communication including WhatsApp and live chat
You send high volumes of transactional emails and need API access

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign offers superior automation and lead scoring, making it better for complex B2B sales processes. Brevo excels in multi-channel communication and provides better value for small businesses or startups with its generous free tier. Both have similar G2 ratings (4.5), but ActiveCampaign edges ahead for advanced users.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Brevo?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper for startups and small teams, with a free plan supporting up to 100,000 contacts. ActiveCampaign has no free option and starts at $15/month. However, at higher contact volumes and paid plans, pricing becomes more comparable, and ActiveCampaign's advanced features may justify the cost.

faq.q: Can I switch from Brevo to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate between platforms. Both support standard data exports and imports. Most migration involves exporting your contact list, email templates, and automation rules from Brevo and importing them into ActiveCampaign. Consider timing this during a low-activity period to ensure clean data transfer.
